title: Ideation Sketch
description: Ce style imite l'énergie dynamique et brute d'un croquis d'idéation en design industriel. Il combine des lignes de construction au stylo à encre fine, expressives et lâches, avec de larges traits de marqueurs à alcool pour les ombrages, se caractérisant par des marques de processus visibles et des annotations manuscrites.
description_en: This style emulates the dynamic, raw energy of an industrial design ideation sketch. It combines loose, expressive fine-liner ink construction lines with bold, broad strokes of alcohol markers for shading and graphic background blocks, characterized by visible process marks, overlapping 'searching' lines, and handwritten annotations.
description_fr: Ce style imite l'énergie dynamique et brute d'un croquis d'idéation en design industriel. Il combine des lignes de construction au stylo à encre fine, expressives et lâches, avec de larges traits de marqueurs à alcool pour les ombrages, se caractérisant par des marques de processus visibles et des annotations manuscrites.
prompt: Traditional industrial design ideation sketch and concept rendering. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The medium is a mixed-media combination of fine-liner black pen ink and broad alcohol marker strokes on smooth sketch paper. The linework is characterized by loose, expressive, and rapid execution, featuring multiple overlapping searching lines, gestural contours, and raw construction lines that deliberately extend beyond the boundaries of the forms. Volumetric form is established using quick, layered washes of {{secondary_color}} marker, leaving visible stroke overlaps and streaking indicative of Copic markers. A bold, graphic, flattened block of {{primary_color}} marker strokes sits assertively behind or around elements to create stark visual contrast and highlight the focal areas, while {{accent_color}} is used sparingly for material callouts. Lighting is implied through high-contrast marker shading and rapid diagonal ink hatching used to denote cast shadows on the ground plane. The composition features an analytical, process-driven aesthetic, complete with spontaneous handwritten design annotations, floating text, and delicate leader lines pointing to specific features. The edge treatment is sketchy and unrefined, with color blocks occasionally breaking outside the ink contours. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners., industrial design sketch, marker rendering, copic marker, fine liner ink, loose construction lines, architectural sketch, concept ideation, handwritten annotations, diagonal hatching, mixed media, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Traditional industrial design ideation sketch and concept rendering composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The medium is a mixed-media combination of fine-liner black pen ink and broad alcohol marker strokes. The linework is characterized by loose, expressive, and rapid execution, featuring multiple overlapping searching lines, gestural contours, and raw construction lines that deliberately extend beyond the boundaries of the forms and interact directly with the {{background_color}} backdrop. Volumetric form is established using quick, layered washes of {{secondary_color}} marker, leaving visible stroke overlaps and streaking indicative of Copic markers. A bold, graphic, flattened block of {{primary_color}} marker strokes sits assertively behind or around elements to create stark visual contrast, while {{accent_color}} is used sparingly for material callouts. Lighting is implied through high-contrast marker shading and rapid diagonal ink hatching used to denote cast shadows directly on the {{background_color}} surface. The composition features an analytical, process-driven aesthetic, complete with spontaneous handwritten design annotations, floating text, and delicate leader lines. The edge treatment is sketchy and unrefined, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}}, construction lines, and marker bleeds can extend beyond the visible frame (cropped by the image boundaries) or fade smoothly into the {{background_color}}., industrial design sketch, marker rendering, copic marker, fine liner ink, loose construction lines, architectural sketch, concept ideation, handwritten annotations, diagonal hatching, mixed media
background_prompt: An abstract industrial design sketch environment, featuring loose fine-liner ink construction lines intersecting across the space. Broad, sweeping vertical strokes of {{primary_color}} alcohol marker create a bold, flattened graphic backdrop, showing visible marker streaking and overlapping edges. Subtle washes of {{secondary_color}} marker suggest a faint ground plane with rapid diagonal ink hatching indicating empty cast shadows. Occasional {{accent_color}} ink splatters and faint, illegible handwritten annotations float in the void, creating an analytical, raw ideation atmosphere on smooth sketch paper.
background_prompt_removebg: An abstract industrial design sketch environment composited against a flat {{background_color}} surface, featuring loose fine-liner ink construction lines intersecting across the space. Broad, sweeping vertical strokes of {{primary_color}} alcohol marker create a bold, flattened graphic backdrop, showing visible marker streaking and overlapping edges. Subtle washes of {{secondary_color}} marker suggest a faint ground plane with rapid diagonal ink hatching indicating empty cast shadows. Occasional {{accent_color}} ink splatters and faint, illegible handwritten annotations float in the void. In the foreground, a loose, sketchy geometric ink frame with extended construction lines and rough {{primary_color}} marker highlights overlays the scene, creating depth while its raw, unrefined edges bleed seamlessly into the surrounding {{background_color}}.
